name: phase07_manifest_editor
outcome_goal: Split-pane raw JSON editor with live preview

jobs.label: p7_manifest_editor
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis/Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Create src/grid/ManifestEditor.tsx:

A split-pane editor: JSON textarea on the left, live QuadrantGrid preview on the right.

Props: { manifestId: string }

Behavior:
- Fetch manifest from /api/manifests/{manifestId}
- Left pane: <textarea> with the manifest JSON, syntax highlighted (just monospace dark bg is fine)
- Right pane: <QuadrantGrid manifest={parsed} /> rendered in a scaled-down preview
- On every keystroke (debounced 300ms): try to parse JSON
  - If valid: update preview, clear error
  - If invalid: show parse error inline, keep last valid preview
- Save button: POST to /api/manifests/save
- Format button: pretty-print the JSON

Styling:
- Full height (calc(100vh - 60px) for nav)
- Left pane: 50% width, dark bg, monospace font, no wrap
- Right pane: 50% width, scaled to 60% with CSS transform for preview
- Resizable divider between panes
- Error bar: red background at bottom of left pane when JSON is invalid

Create src/grid/ManifestEditor.css for styles.

Write both files.

jobs.label: p7_editor_route
jobs.prompt:
You are working in /Users/nate/Praxis/Code&DBs/Workflow/surfaces/app/src/.

Update App.tsx to support the manifest editor route:

- When URL has ?manifest=editor&target=<id>, render ManifestEditor instead of QuadrantGrid
- Import ManifestEditor from './grid/ManifestEditor'
- The detection should happen before the V1/V2 manifest check
- Add an 'Edit' link in the NavBar that goes to ?manifest=editor&target=<current_manifest_id>

Also add 'Editor' to the NavBar links if we're currently viewing the editor.

Write the updated App.tsx.
